Definition.text: Damage Taken As redirects part of incoming Damage to a different damage type before final mitigation on the receiving side.

Purpose.text: Normalize defensive type remapping from incoming damage allocation to final defenses.

Core Rules.text: The mechanic is damage type shift, not full conversion semantics; shifted amount is processed as destination type for mitigation.

Internal Rules.text: Shift is resolved in a single pass for each incoming event.

Calculation Order.text: 1) build incoming damage by source type 2) apply Damage Taken As shares 3) apply final-type mitigation.

Priority Rules.text: Mechanics with explicit destination-type restrictions override generic shift behavior.

Preconditions.text: Incoming damage event exists and a Damage Taken As source is active.

Postconditions.text: Damage shares are split across destination types and mitigated through destination defenses.

Limitations.text: Shifted damage is not repeatedly remapped in the same resolution layer.

Caps.text: No explicit global cap is defined for the core mechanic.

Formula.text: For each destination type B: shifted_B = Σ(source_A * share_A_to_B), evaluated in single-pass allocation.

prevents: double mitigation from source and destination

Conflicts.text: Damage conversion mechanics differ by deleting source type prior to mitigation.

Exceptions.text: If text explicitly limits to hits, damage over time does not receive the shift.

Hidden Rules.text: This mechanic feeds destination resistances and mitigation with shifted amounts in same event pass.

Developer Notes.text: Store as per-event share matrix to prevent stacked recursive interpretation bugs.

Historical Changes.text: No patch-level redefinition captured in this pass.

text.note: Damage Taken As remains single-pass shift before final-type mitigation.

text: 100 Physical with 40% Damage Taken As Fire creates 40 Fire and 60 Physical allocation.
Fire-to-Lightning and Lightning-to-Physical modifiers in same layer are resolved with single-pass ordering.
Damage Taken As is equal to Damage Conversion.
Shifted damage is mitigated as both source and destination types.

metadata.source_authority: Path of Exile official terminology source
